Overview Quick start Schema architecture Interactive samples Root schema example extends extensions link metadata presentation purpose rich-text status component pattern style theme token accessibility anatomy api best-practice content design-specifications guideline interaction motion principle scale state variant

4 definitions in this file:

  • presentationImage
  • presentationVideo
  • presentationCode
  • presentationUrl
 Identifies this presentation as an image. URL or relative path to the image file. Alternative text describing the image content. MUST be provided for accessibility. Identifies this presentation as a video. URL or relative path to the video file. Alternative text describing the video content. MUST be provided for accessibility. Identifies this presentation as a code snippet. The source code of the example. The programming language or syntax (e.g., 'jsx', 'tsx', 'html', 'css', 'vue', 'svelte', 'swift', 'kotlin'). Identifies this presentation as a URL reference to a web resource. URL to the web resource (e.g., 'https://storybook.acme.com/?path=/story/components-button--primary', 'https://codesandbox.io/s/button-example').

Design System Documentation Standard (DSDS) 0.1 — Draft Specification

GitHub
